## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Superhuman's content strategy and priorities post-acquisition with Grammarly.](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on two main content areas: virtual event content and gated thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [New content strategy aligns Grammarly, Superhuman, and Coda as an integrated AI productivity suite](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Need to confirm timing of content rollout with Superhuman leadership (pre/post Oct 6 rebrand)](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Exploring options for creating valuable gated content, potentially using user survey data](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

## Topics

### Content Priorities

  - [Virtual event content: Repurpose monthly webinars into blog posts, social content](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Gated thought leadership: Develop strategy for creating valuable gated content](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Social media strategy deprioritized due to uncertainty about channel ownership](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Post-Acquisition Content Strategy

  - [Four core pillars: Platform integration, Enterprise AI transformation, Management, Industry solutions & ROI](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Content types: Blog posts, LinkedIn posts, repurposed webinars, gated content](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [SEO focus: Target keywords for both traditional search and AI-powered search (CLAW, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Timing: Unclear whether to start now or wait for Oct 6 rebrand; need leadership input](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### LinkedIn Content Workflow

  - [Created two months of weekly posts for Luik](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Harmony provides second drafts in Notion for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Need more granular feedback to fine-tune the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Gated Content Ideas

  - [Potential user survey for unique data on productivity, AI usage](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Alana working on managed customer case studies (enterprise accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Consider creating infographics or checklists (historically high-performing)](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Explore proprietary data options, e.g., expanding on existing usage statistics](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

### Webinar Strategy

  - [Monthly schedule: Two lead-gen webinars, one customer product-focused webinar](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Recent OpenAI speaker content unusable due to last-minute restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [September webinar planned: "How to be an AI champion at your company" (partner focus)](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Morgan to follow up with Alex and Harmony about content strategy timing (pre/post Oct 6)](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Morgan to ping Alana for updates on managed customer case studies](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [GrowthX to brainstorm gated content ideas using Superhuman user data](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Morgan to send YouTube links of recent usable webinars for content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Megan to tidy up content strategy document, emphasizing various content types per pillar](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Schedule discussion on Scrunched data (LLM mentions of Superhuman) for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/V85G_DNVLZsndhUPyxUF-SURFAHTvJxo?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
